summary_one_line: Input must contain the literal FOURCC tag bytes 'COLR' at the table-directory offset so the COLR table parses and get_extents returns true.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The 4 literal bytes 0x43 0x4f 0x4c 0x52 ('COLR') must appear at the SFNT table-directory tag slot (offset 0x0c-0x0f in the winning seeds), so harfbuzz recognizes a COLR table and ot_face->COLR->get_extents resolves the glyph extents, taking the true branch at line 388.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: All five winner-resolving seeds carry the exact ASCII tag 'COLR' (43 4f 4c 52) at offset 0x0c-0x0f, and the BYTE DIFF shows offsets 0x0c-0x0f are concentrated to a single value 43/4f/4c/52 x10 across all winners; the blocker line 388 is hit T=38 in W vs T=0 in L.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: The loser-blocking seeds have scattered, non-'COLR' bytes at offsets 0x0c-0x0f (e.g. 00/01/2c/2b at 0x0c, 20/18/08/fb at 0x0d), so no COLR table is recognized; the loser hits line 388 only on the false side (T=0 F=21) and blocks for the full 24h.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds the I2SRandReplace mutator that value_profile lacks; the COLR-tag comparison inside harfbuzz's table-directory scan is intercepted by the CmpLog buffer, and I2SRandReplace copies the constant 'COLR' operand directly into the input at the compared offset, instantly satisfying the 4-byte equality gate that value_profile (lacking I2SRandReplace) could only approach by slow Hamming-distance hill-climbing.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the COLR table get_extents call at hb-ot-font.cc:388, true branch globally blocked.
value_profile_cmplog resolves the branch in all 10 trials while value_profile blocks in all 10.
The winning seeds contain the literal ASCII 'COLR' tag bytes.
Offsets 0x0c-0x0f are concentrated to the single value C/O/L/R across all ten winners while losers are scattered.
The blocker line 388 is taken on the true side in W (T=38) but never in L (T=0).
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L 388  T=38 F=8  T=0 F=21  if (ot_face->COLR->get_extents (font, glyph, extents)) re...  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile lacks the I2SRandReplace mutator and relies on the CMP_MAP gradient.
value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace on top of the havoc/token stack.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 5439 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed 4b5aee4031d745d5` and observed exactly one I2S-floor row (mutation_op = -, ParentInfo-only) at depth 24 of the 25-level ancestor chain (ancestor e0a5b09f80625fb6); the dash row is exclusive to cmplog/vpc and is the I2S-floor signal under the current build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness with the same 4-byte 'COLR' equality gate where value_profile resolves the true branch as often as value_profile_cmplog (no I2S advantage), which would show the gate is reachable by gradient/havoc alone.

weakest_evidence_point: The exact table-directory offset of the COLR tag is inferred from the winner seed layout at 0x0c-0x0f rather than confirmed from harfbuzz's SFNT directory parsing source, so the precise compared offset could shift.
